english translation text:
EVEN AFTER IMAM SAJJAD (A.S.) WAS RELEASED FROM PRISON AND RETURNED HOMES,
HE USED TO SHED TEARS,

SYEDA ZAINAB ( A.S.) COULD NOT BEAR HIS PAIN,
ONE DAY SHE ANXIOUSLY ASKED HIM, "SAJJAD TILL WHEN WILL YOU CRY?"
IMAM SAJJAD REPLIED, "O’ AUNT, HOW CAN I NOT CRY AT WHAT HAS BEFALLEN US, AND AT THE QUESTIONS OF FATIMA SUGRA?"

O’ AUNT I AM THE ONE WHO SAW HIS FATHER'S HEAD UPON A SPEAR,
I TRAVELLED ALONGSIDE THE ONE WHO RIPPED THE CHEST OF ALI AKBAR,
AND I SAW THE CHILDREN BEING LASHED FOR CRYING

I HAVE SEEN THE HEAD OF ABBAS (A.S) FALLING FROM THE SPEAR,
WHY DID I NOT DIE WHEN YOUR NAME WAS CALLED IN THE COURT OF YAZID,
THE CURSED MAN USED TO SAY TO BRING YOU UNVEILED

EVERYONE WAS MARTYRED AND I AM ALIVE, I COULD HAVE FOUGHT EVEN THOUGH I WAS ILL,
I AM ASHAMED TO FACE ASGHER WHO TOOK AN ARROW ON HIS NECK,
WHY DID THAT ARROW NOT HIT ME?

IT IS A TOUGHT TEST TO FACE SUGRA NOW,
WHAT WILL I REPLY IF SHE WERE TO ASK ME HOW COME ALI AKBER DIED,
HOW CAN I BE PATIENT, THERE ARE MANY WOUNDS IN MY HEART

MY FATHER'S HEAD WAS ON A PLATTER, AND THE KILLER WAS SITTING ON THE THRONE,
HE USED TO GLEEFULLY HIT THE CANE ON MY FATHER'S TEETH
ALAS! I WASN'T ABLE TO DO ANYTHING, AND THAT IS THE CAUSE OF THE PAIN IN MY HEART
